text_block_list.text: I find some time to drop by the dance studio...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Right hand, left hand, step back! Raise both
hands and swing them—

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Sorry about that! Are you okay?!
choice_data_list: All good. You're really getting into this.
All good. You're really getting into this.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I can't wait to take center stage and put on
an awesome show at my winning concert!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I've been pumped up like crazy ever since I saw
Dia's concert!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Yep! Dia's incredible! She shines so brilliantly on stage, you'd think she was a real diamond!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: She's fearless, you know? And it really shows in her performances! They even got me worked up!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
She's so effortlessly cool—I wanna be able to
dance like her!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But when I start thinking about it all, my head
gets all mixed up...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Advice... Yeah, good idea! I'll go ask some of the
Umamusume I look up to!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
...So please, Teio! I beg you! Tell me the secret to
putting on an amazing concert!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ho ho ho, this is my specialty!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Well, all right! Listen closely! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
First, let's get a video of you dancing! We can do
it together!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh?! I-I get to dance with you?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You there! Come on over and record us with your
phone!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Phew, okay. Let's see how it turned out... Hit play!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: N-next to you, it's super obvious how clumsy I am. This is so embarrassing!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Mm... I'm not sure clumsiness is the issue here. I'd
say it's something more... basic?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Kita, you were focused entirely on me while you
were dancing, weren't you?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh?! I... I was! You're right!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! I like your honesty! But I shouldn't be your
focus during a concert, you know?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
The truth is, my favorite thing about concerts is
when everyone tells me how cool I am!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I used to shout about how cool Prez was, and now I'm the one receiving the cheers! Pretty amazing, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
That's why I always dance my heart out! It's like,
"Check it out! I won! I'm the best!"

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
What about you? How do you feel when you're up
on that stage?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: How do I feel? Well...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
At Teio's winning concerts, I used to scream until
my voice went out...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: And this time, there are going to be just as many people cheering me on...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: That makes me feel so... so...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
...I get it now. Dia must have understood this
feeling—that's why she looked so awesome out
there.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Teio! I wanna put on a super cool performance
that'll make the crowd go wild!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Good, good. That's the first hurdle cleared! Now
all you gotta do is put in the work!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Right! Let's get back to practicing!

It looks like the idea of expressing her feelings
through her performance has helped Kitasan
Black make some progress.
